land_pattern.locator: page 1, package drawing, circuit diagram, and PCB land dimension
land_pattern.coordinate_convention: Origin at package centre in top view; positive x right and positive y down.

symbol.tool_version: Component Intelligence native CAD generator 2.0 / KiCad 10 syntax
symbol.provenance: Original Lyon Industries native symbol derived from the official contact arrangement and independently compared with the normalized four-terminal topology.

footprint.tool_version: Component Intelligence native CAD generator 2.0 / KiCad 10 syntax
footprint.provenance: Original Lyon Industries footprint derived from the official PCB land dimensions and independently compared with the corrected four-pad reference implementation.

step_model.provenance: Original Lyon Industries nominal mechanical-clearance model generated from the official body, height, terminal-span, and actuator dimensions.
limitations: The model is authoritative for nominal seating and clearance envelope only; it does not reproduce undocumented cosmetic or internal detail.

orientation.description: Footprint rotation 0 is the manufacturer top view with the actuator facing up: pad 1 at negative x/negative y, pad 2 at positive x/negative y, pad 3 at negative x/positive y, and pad 4 at positive x/positive y. The filled F.SilkS dot and chamfered F.Fab corner identify pad 1. Confirm feeder rotation from the page 2 tape drawing and the first placed article; the switch is non-polar but terminal grouping is not interchangeable within a two-net implementation.

notes: Use infrared reflow in accordance with IEC 61760-1 and the page 2 profile: ramp up below 3 K/s, ramp down below 6 K/s, approximately 45 to 90 seconds above 220 degC, and no more than two reflow cycles.
The native footprint uses one-to-one paste apertures and 0.05 mm local solder-mask expansion around each 1.0 mm by 0.7 mm copper land.
The exact suffix identifies J-bend SMT, 2.5 mm height, tape-and-reel, and RoHS silver-plated terminals; slightly activated flux is suitable for the plated terminals.
The reviewed datasheet does not establish wash, conformal-coating, moisture-sensitivity, or sealed-enclosure suitability. Do not infer those properties.
Keep the actuator accessible and prevent an enclosure from preloading it; nominal travel is 0.20 mm with 0.10 mm tolerance.

findings.summary: A two-pad abstraction placed each copper land across one terminal from each internally separate pole, which would hold the connected signal shorted even when the button was not pressed.
An initial visual interpretation paired terminals by package side; the official circuit diagram shows that terminals 1-2 and 3-4 are the internally common groups.
The official PDF is browser-readable but direct automated byte capture returned HTTP 403, so this seed does not claim a source-file hash.

The bundled STEP file is a nominal mechanical-clearance model. It is suitable for seating, orientation, and enclosure-envelope checks, but not for internal, cosmetic, tolerance-stack, or actuator-force simulation.

checks.name: source identity
checks.method: Reviewed the current official three-page datasheet and exact orderable-device row for PTS815SJM250SMTRLFS; direct byte capture remained blocked by HTTP 403.

checks.name: contact topology
checks.method: Compared every terminal callout with the official circuit diagram, then independently compared the result with the corrected four-terminal irrigation-controller reference design.

checks.name: land coordinates
checks.method: Cross-checked all four 1.0 mm by 0.7 mm lands, centres, top-view numbering, and body envelope against the manufacturer drawing and a separate corrected KiCad footprint.

checks.name: native symbol and footprint
checks.method: KiCad 10.0.4 parsed and rendered the native symbol and footprint; pin, pad, layer, origin, and STEP seating checks passed.

checks.name: STEP geometry
checks.method: CadQuery 2.8.0 generated the original STEP file and Open CASCADE bounded it at x -2.3 to 2.3 mm, y -1.6 to 1.6 mm, and z 0 to 2.5 mm before export. The generator normalizes the STEP metadata timestamp; two consecutive exports produced the same SHA-256.

rights.normalized_record_origin: Original Lyon Industries normalization and previews based on the linked official source.
